title: Mandy Mackinnon
compiled_truth: Mandy Mackinnon is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-14 to 2000-06-30), Mandy Mackinnon sent 9 and received 44 emails, totalling 53 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (9), [Stella Morris](people/stella-morris) (5), [Pat Clynes](people/pat-clynes) (5), [Jackie Young](people/jackie-young) (2), [Fred Boas](people/fred-boas) (2).
